---
title: "Flyer & Cheatsheets"
---

**Access cheatsheets, flyers, and additional infos on central open
science-topics via this site.**

| Topic | Flyer | Cheatsheet | All you need to know |
|----|----|----|----|
| Research Assessment | <https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20281741> | — | — |
| Open Access | <https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.17713976> | <https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20811845> | <https://lukasroeseler.github.io/MueCOS-Infomodule/flyerinfos/openaccess.html> |
| Open Data | <https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.17713704> | <https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20811593> | <https://www.uni-muenster.de/Forschungsdaten/en> |
| Preregistration | <https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.17713297> | <https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20812114> | <https://lukasroeseler.github.io/MueCOS-Infomodule/flyerinfos/preregistration.html> |
| Replication Research | <https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.17776685> | — | <https://www.uni-muenster.de/Ejournals/index.php/replicationresearch/index> |

More resources are available at
[zenodo.org/communities/muecos/](https://zenodo.org/communities/muecos/records?q=&l=list&p=1&s=10&sort=newest).
Reach out to lukas.roeseler\[at\]uni-muenster.de if you are interested
in printed versions of the flyers.
